posts.author: witherowj (James Witherow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi,

We were caught out by it not being possible to print a ticket, at least in usable form.

We have a number of internal teams that have started using Monday as a service desk and some are not technical or it’s not appropriate to use a device to access Monday directly. So printing is a simple workaround for this.

It would be helpful if the print reflected the current ticket view, so the columns included can be adjusted.

Thanks

What are you trying to achieve

Print a paper copy of a ticket as a job ticket to physically give someone to complete a job.
